Amazon Stretchy Jeans👖🩵 midsize + plus size-friendly find!

If you’ve tried relax-style jeans before and they drown you out, this is the style for you! They’re stretchy, fitted in the hips/booty, and relax/wide leg throughout! The fit is incredible, soft, and so comfy!

This style is available in reg. 24-32 and plus-size 14-24!
